overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game (Starfield) showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial space station. The character walks through corridors with Crimson Fleet graffiti, enters an open social area with a bar, briefly draws a weapon on an NPC, and approaches a medical clinic entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with docking port graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial corridor past closed shutter doors and Crimson Fleet graffiti

entered.detail: large metal roll-up door with red and white hazard stripes and CLOSED signage
white skull symbol painted on wall next to closed sign
spray-painted text reading CRIMSON FLEET on the metal wall
stenciled industrial text indicating docking ports direction
exposed ventilation ducts and cable runs along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and ceiling pipes. A large closed shutter door with hazard stripes dominates the view ahead, while Crimson Fleet graffiti and skull decals mark the walls. The lighting is dim and artificial with a greenish tint.

scene_state.functional_zone: open social area with bar and seating

events.description: exits narrow corridor and ascends stairs into larger open docking area with bar

agents.ego_description: walking through the open social area toward a bar and seating section

notable_agents.action: heavily armored NPC standing near the bar counter facing the character

entered.detail: illuminated vertical sign reading BAR in white letters
red warning lights casting crimson glow on the left wall
white plastic chairs and tables arranged against the wall
long counter with stools and bottles in the background
stanchions with rope cordoning off an area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a larger open area with mixed red and green lighting. A bar with illuminated signage occupies the right side while seating areas line the left. An armored NPC stands in the center area as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical clinic entrance with reception desk

events.description: character draws weapon and aims at NPC who raises hands in surrender
holsters weapon and resumes walking toward clinic entrance

agents.ego_description: drawing weapon on an NPC briefly before proceeding to enter the medical clinic doorway

notable_agents.action: NPC in heavy armor raising hands in surrender gesture when weapon is aimed

entered.detail: handwritten sign reading CLINIC taped above blue door frame
open doorway leading into the medical bay interior
empty plastic chair outside the clinic entrance
visible medical devices and storage inside the clinic

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an NPC and briefly draws a weapon, causing the NPC to surrender with raised hands. After holstering the weapon, the character continues toward a medical clinic entrance marked by a handwritten sign, passing a white chair and entering the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a spacious social hub and finally toward a medical facility. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow hallway of metal walls and ceiling pipes, where dim greenish lighting illuminates Crimson Fleet graffiti and a large shutter door with hazard stripes. As the character passes through the threshold, the scene opens into a larger area defined by mixed red and green lighting, featuring an illuminated bar to the right and seating areas to the left. The camera then follows the character as they briefly draw a weapon on an armored NPC, before shifting focus forward toward a medical clinic entrance marked by a handwritten sign. The movement concludes as the character passes a white chair and enters the clinic doorway.
